Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters withdrawal:
- Closes the FC chest window after a successful Crafters withdrawal queue completes.
- Keeps Artisan handoff unblocked after materials are withdrawn.
- Keeps the all-or-nothing FC chest material validation from the previous release.
